name: Merck & Co., Inc.
description: Merck & Co., Inc. is a leading American multinational pharmaceutical company headquartered in Rahway, New Jersey. Known as MSD outside the United States and Canada, the company focuses on discovering, developing, and providing innovative medicines and vaccines to address unmet medical needs. With a rich history of scientific research, Merck operates globally to advance healthcare solutions in areas such as oncology, infectious diseases, and cardiovascular health. The company is committed to using the power of leading-edge science to save and improve lives, maintaining a significant presence in the global biomedical industry.
